sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Oppenheimer Reiterates Outperform Rating for Xylem (NYSE:XYL)
feed.summary: Oppenheimer has reiterated an "Outperform" rating for Xylem (NYSE:XYL) with a $160 price target, suggesting a potential 30.3% upside. The company recently authorized a $1.50 billion share repurchase program, indicating management views the stock as undervalued, and reported quarterly EPS of $1.42, meeting estimates. Several other analysts have also issued ratings on Xylem, resulting in a consensus "Moderate Buy" rating.

feed.title: Jabil Target of Unusually High Options Trading (NYSE:JBL)
feed.summary: Jabil, Inc. (NYSE:JBL) experienced an unusually high volume of put options trading, with investors purchasing 10,369 put options, a 169% increase from the typical daily volume. Despite this, analysts have maintained largely positive ratings, with a consensus "Moderate Buy" and an average price target of $283.25. The company recently reported strong earnings, exceeding analyst expectations, and has a market capitalization of $29.02 billion.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Cuts Moelis & Company (NYSE:MC) Price Target to $62.00
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has lowered its price target for Moelis & Company (NYSE:MC) from $70.00 to $62.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating on the asset manager's stock. This new target suggests a potential upside of 8.28% from the company's previous close. Despite a strong prior quarter with earnings and revenue exceeding expectations, analyst sentiment remains mixed, with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average target price of $74.56.

feed.title: The Goldman Sachs Group Has Lowered Expectations for FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) Stock Price
feed.summary: The Goldman Sachs Group has reduced its price target for FactSet Research Systems (NYSE:FDS) from $253.00 to $217.00, maintaining a "sell" rating. This implies a potential downside of 3.4% from the prior closing price. This adjustment comes despite FactSet reporting better-than-expected earnings and revenue and authorizing a $600 million share buyback program.

feed.title: American Express confirms $7.15M lounge project at CLT
feed.summary: American Express has confirmed a $7.15 million project for a new "Sidecar by The Centurion Lounge" at Charlotte Douglas International Airport (CLT), scheduled to open in 2027. This will be CLT's ninth private club, following a successful launch of the "Sidecar" concept in Las Vegas. The article mentions the news in the context of other developments at CLT, including plans for a Capital One lounge.

feed.title: Veeam Earns 2026 Gartner Peer Insights Customers' Choice Recognition
feed.summary: Veeam Software has been recognized as a Customers' Choice in the 2026 Gartner Peer Insights "Voice of the Customer" for backup and data protection platforms. The company achieved an impressive overall rating of 4.8 out of 5 from 124 reviews, with 98% of customers willing to recommend their offerings. This recognition reinforces Veeam's market leadership and its strategy to integrate data resilience, security, and AI governance into its platform.

feed.title: Quanta Services (PWR) Receives Price Target Adjustment from Ever
feed.summary: Evercore ISI Group has maintained its "Outperform" rating for Quanta Services (PWR) and raised its price target from $604.00 to $635.00, a 5.13% increase. This adjustment is part of a trend of upward revisions from multiple analyst firms, suggesting strong confidence in the company's future prospects. Quanta Services, a provider of infrastructure solutions for critical industries, has an average analyst target price of $581.79, implying a modest upside, although GuruFocus estimates a potential downside based on its GF Value.

feed.title: ServiceNow Drops 32% Year to Date: Should You Still Buy the Stock?
feed.summary: ServiceNow shares have dropped significantly year-to-date due to macroeconomic challenges and increased competition from companies like Microsoft, Oracle, and Salesforce. Despite this underperformance, its expanding AI platform, growing customer base, and high retention rates are expected to drive top-line growth. While the stock currently trades at a premium valuation, its strong growth outlook and a Zacks Rank #2 (Buy) suggest it may still be a favorable investment.

feed.title: Patrick Dupuis files initial Wipro (NYSE: WIT) insider Form 3
feed.summary: Wipro director Patrick Dupuis has filed an initial Form 3 insider report, revealing his status as a director of WIPRO LTD. The filing, which is an initial statement of beneficial ownership, indicates no reported share transactions, option exercises, or gifts at this time. This Form 3 serves as an opening inventory sheet for his holdings, with all transaction counts currently at zero.

feed.title: Merck (NYSE: MRK) director receives new cash-settled phantom stock grant
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. director Christine E. Seidman was granted 67.5451 cash-settled phantom stock units on March 31, 2026, with each unit tracking Merck common stock at $120.29. These units will be paid out in cash upon her termination of service. Following this transaction, Seidman holds a total of 19,238.3277 phantom stock units and 100 shares of Merck common stock.

feed.title: Accor Agrees to Sell Hotel Stake to Blackstone Consortium
feed.summary: Accor SA has signed a memorandum of understanding to sell its 30.56% stake in Essendi (formerly AccorInvest) to a consortium led by Blackstone Inc. and Colony Investment Management for up to €975 million, including an initial €675 million. The deal will also involve the gradual conversion of Essendi's portfolio into franchise contracts.

feed.title: ITW: Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target to $245, Maintains Underwei
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O'Dea has lowered the price target for Illinois Tool Works (ITW) from $270 to $245 while maintaining an "Underweight" rating. This adjustment reflects a cautious outlook, despite other analysts having raised their price targets for ITW earlier in 2026. The consensus among 19 brokerage firms indicates a "Hold" status for ITW, with an average target price of $276.03, suggesting a modest upside from its current price.

feed.title: Merck (NYSE: MRK) director granted new phantom stock units
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. director Mary Ellen Coe was granted 249.3973 phantom stock units at a reference price of $120.29 per unit. These units, which track Merck common stock on a 1-for-1 basis, will be settled entirely in cash upon her termination of service according to a deferred payment plan. This award increases her total phantom stock holdings to 29,702.6519 units, in addition to her direct ownership of 10 common shares.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal stock gains as strong intraday buying meets resistance at key levels
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal (BMO) stock saw a 1.48% gain, indicating short-term upward momentum, though it is meeting resistance at key technical levels such as the SMA-50 and Ichimoku Kijun. While intraday buying is strong, conflicting technical indicators and overbought conditions suggest potential short-term volatility. The bank is also undergoing strategic shifts, including the termination of certain ETFs and a new wealth management focus, targeting over 15% return on equity by 2028.

feed.title: TGLS SEC Filings - Tecnoglass Inc 10-K, 10-Q, 8-K Forms
feed.summary: This page provides access to U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission filings for Tecnoglass Inc. (NYSE: TGLS), a producer of high-end aluminum and vinyl windows and architectural glass. Investors can find 10-K annual reports, 10-Q quarterly earnings, 8-K material events, and insider trading forms. The platform also offers AI-powered summaries, impact scoring, and sentiment analysis for each filing to help users understand complex disclosures.

feed.title: ZenaTech Inc options imply 11.6% move in share price post-earnings
feed.summary: Options trading for ZenaTech Inc (ZENA) suggests a potential 11.6% movement in its share price following its upcoming earnings release. Call options are significantly outweighing put options, indicating a bullish sentiment among traders. The article also mentions ZenaTech's recent developments, including an autonomous underwater vehicle prototype and an integrated counter-UAS system.

feed.title: Boston Scientific (BSX) Says CHAMPION-AF Trial Meets All Primary Endpoints
feed.summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) announced that its CHAMPION-AF clinical trial for the WATCHMAN FLX device met all primary and secondary safety and efficacy endpoints, demonstrating a significant reduction in non-procedural bleeding risk for patients with non-valvular atrial fibrillation. This positive data led Goldman Sachs to reiterate a Buy rating, despite a lowered price target, while Evercore ISI added BSX to its "Tactical Outperform" list. The results were presented at the American College of Cardiology’s Annual Scientific Session and published in The New England Journal of Medicine.

feed.title: SpaceX Has Filed Confidentially For Its IPO: Report
feed.summary: SpaceX has reportedly submitted a confidential draft IPO registration to the SEC, with major banks like Bank of America, Goldman Sachs, JPMorgan Chase, and Morgan Stanley involved. The company is considering a dual-class share structure and executives plan to meet with prospective investors this month. Investors seeking concentrated exposure to SpaceX can find it in mutual funds like Baron Partners Fund and Baron Focused Growth Fund, as well as the ARK Venture Fund and the ERShares Private-Public Crossover ETF (NASDAQ: XOVR).

feed.title: Ellucian Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for Second Consecutive Year
feed.summary: Ellucian has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Higher Education Student Information System Software as a Service (SIS SaaS) for the second consecutive year. The company was positioned highest in Ability to Execute and furthest in Completeness of Vision. Ellucian's platform, Ellucian Student, is highlighted for its AI-powered, student-first strategy, aiming to provide personalized experiences and improve student retention and success.

feed.title: A Look At Take Two Interactive Software (TTWO) Valuation After Guidance Raise And GTA VI Launch Date Confirmation
feed.summary: Take-Two Interactive Software (TTWO) has seen increased investor attention after reporting strong fiscal Q3 results, raising its fiscal 2026 net bookings outlook, and confirming the November 19, 2026 launch date for Grand Theft Auto VI. Despite these positive developments, the stock has experienced short-term declines, leading to questions about its current valuation. While a "narrative fair value" suggests TTWO is 4.6% undervalued, a contrasting view based on P/S ratios indicates it is trading at a premium compared to its industry and peers.

feed.title: FactSet (NYSE:FDS) Strengthens Financial Data Solutions In Russell 1000 Index
feed.summary: FactSet (NYSE:FDS) provides financial data and analytics through a unified platform, serving global institutions and maintaining its presence within the Russell 1000 index. The article highlights FactSet's role in delivering comprehensive financial solutions. To access the full content, readers are prompted to log in or create an account.

feed.title: TeraWulf (WULF) Is Down 14.4% After Heavy Insider Sales Raise Questions On Management Commitment
feed.summary: TeraWulf (WULF) shares dropped 14.4% following significant insider sales, including CEO Paul Prager selling 28% of his stake. These sales raise concerns about management's long-term commitment and the viability of TeraWulf's pivot from bitcoin mining to high-value hosting, especially given its heavy investments and substantial losses. The selling occurred despite TeraWulf's recent announcement of a large HPC joint venture with Fluidstack, backed by Google-supported debt, which is central to its strategy of shifting to AI-focused revenue.

feed.title: Darlington holds 7.55M shares of Warner Music (WMG) — 5.1% stake
feed.summary: Darlington Partners entities have reported a shared beneficial ownership of 7,551,884 shares of Warner Music Group Corp. (WMG) Class A Common Stock, constituting a 5.1% stake. This information was disclosed in a Schedule 13G SEC filing, with the percentage calculated based on 146,965,855 shares outstanding as of February 4, 2026. The filing names DPCM LP, Darlington Partners GP, LLC, Darlington Partners, L.P., and two managers (Scott W. Clark and Ramsey B. Jishi) as reporting persons with shared voting and dispositive power.

feed.title: Deutsche Bank Initiates Coverage on Ball (BALL) with 'Buy' Rating
feed.summary: Deutsche Bank has initiated coverage on Ball Corporation (BALL) with a "Buy" rating and set a price target of $72.00 USD. This optimistic outlook comes despite recent analyst actions, where some maintained "Outperform" but slightly lowered price targets. The report highlights Ball's market dominance as the world's largest metal can manufacturer and its strategic focus on increasing capacity and investing in emerging markets.

feed.title: Smurfit Westrock Confirms Updated Total Voting Rights and Share Capital
feed.summary: Smurfit Westrock (SW) has announced its updated total voting rights and share capital as of March 31, 2026. The company's issued share capital consists of 524,457,866 ordinary shares with a nominal value of $0.001 each, and it holds no treasury shares. This disclosure provides clarity for shareholders regarding their regulatory obligations under U.K. transparency rules.

feed.title: Chipotle Mexican Grill Stock: Navigating Flat Comps Guidance and Expansion in a Challenging Consumer
feed.summary: Chipotle Mexican Grill faces investor caution due to flat same-store sales guidance for fiscal 2026, driven by softer traffic, despite continued robust unit growth and digital initiatives. The company plans to release its Q1 2026 earnings on April 29, which investors will closely watch for signs of traffic recovery, margin resilience, and the effectiveness of its strategic initiatives like Chipotlanes and digital promotions. While Chipotle exhibits strong brand power and operational efficiency, risks include prolonged consumer traffic declines and potential margin compression from rising costs, making Q1 earnings critical for its future stock performance.

feed.title: T-Mobile might buy Uniti Group's Kinetic fiber assets
feed.summary: T-Mobile is reportedly looking to acquire fiber assets from Uniti Group, potentially partnering with private equity firm TPG. The speculation has led to a rise in Uniti's stock. This move aligns with a broader trend of consolidation in the U.S. fiber industry, as wireless carriers aim to bundle FTTH services with wireless offerings for competitive advantage.

feed.title: T-Mobile might buy Uniti Group's Kinetic fiber assets
feed.summary: T-Mobile is reportedly looking to acquire fiber assets from Uniti Group, potentially partnering with TPG for a larger acquisition. This move aligns with T-Mobile's strategy to expand its fiber holdings, especially after rival carriers have made similar acquisitions. Analysts anticipate significant consolidation in the U.S. fiber industry as wireless providers aim to bundle FTTH services with their wireless offerings.

feed.title: Erie (ERIE) EVP records minor 401(k) Class A stock change
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company EVP Douglas Edward Smith reported a minor participant-directed 401(k) transaction involving 1.15 shares of Class A Common Stock. This adjustment, priced at $251.31 per share, is classified as a routine retirement-account reallocation, not a traditional open-market trade. Following the transaction, Smith directly holds 5,164.686 shares of the company's Class A stock.

feed.title: 84 hours, 60 speakers: XP event spotlights Brazil's evolving traders
feed.summary: XP Inc. recently hosted its inaugural "Expert Trader XP" event, featuring 84 hours of content and 60 speakers, including trading psychologist Tom Hougaard and charting pioneer Ralph Acampora. The event focused on enhancing trading discipline and integrating technical, fundamental, and AI insights to professionalize Brazil's trading community. This initiative highlights XP's commitment to investor education and fostering a more sophisticated trading ecosystem in Brazil.

feed.title: American Express to open a two-story lounge at Logan with a terrace and a view
feed.summary: American Express has announced plans to open a 20,000-square-foot, two-story Centurion Lounge at Logan International Airport's Terminal C in 2029. The lounge will feature an outdoor terrance with airfield views, local artwork, high-end food and beverages, and dedicated workspaces. American Express is committing approximately $391 million to the project, with Massport approving a $75 million budget for the lounge's shell.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) EVP restructures 401(k) shares and holds 2,678 credits
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company's Executive Vice President, Sarah Shine, reported a participant-directed restructuring of 5.518 Class A common shares within her 401(k) plan. This transaction, coded as "other," resulted in her holding 538.342 directly owned Class A shares. Additionally, Shine holds 2,678.365 Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan share credits, which represent the right to receive an equivalent number of Class A common shares upon retirement or separation from the company.

feed.title: Vodafone GigaCube: Revolutionizing Mobile Broadband with Unlimited 5G Home Connectivity for North Am
feed.summary: Vodafone's GigaCube is a 5G mobile broadband solution offering high-speed, unlimited internet via a portable router, crucial for European home connectivity as 5G networks expand. It has become a key part of Vodafone's 5G home internet strategy, with over 500,000 active units in Germany alone, showcasing its role in bridging mobile and fixed network convergence. The service also offers North American investors indirect exposure to the European telecom rebound through Vodafone Group plc ADR, providing a stable dividend yield and debt reduction benefits.

feed.title: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) director granted 33 cash-settled phantom stock units
feed.summary: Caterpillar Inc. director David MacLennan was granted 33 cash-settled phantom stock units, valued at $690.44 each, bringing his total to 453 units. These units are part of Caterpillar's Director's Deferred Compensation Plan and are the economic equivalent of common stock, settling in cash upon his retirement or separation. This transaction was not an open-market purchase, and the filing was made via SEC Form 4.

feed.title: A surgeon and Intuitive exec explain what da Vinci 5's 10,000x computing leap actually looks like, inside and outside the OR
feed.summary: The da Vinci 5, Intuitive's latest surgical system, offers a 10,000x computing power increase over its predecessor, enabling new capabilities like force sensing and advanced data analytics. Surgeons like Douglas Stoddard are using features like telepresence and Case Insights to review procedures, quantify surgical movements, and collaborate globally, moving surgery from an art to a more data-driven science. This technological leap aims to reduce variability in surgical outcomes, broaden access to surgical expertise, and accelerate discovery in the field.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target for Parker Hannifin (PH) to $980
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O'Dea maintained an "Overweight" rating for Parker Hannifin (PH) but lowered the price target from $1050 to $980. This adjustment represents a 6.67% decrease. Despite the lower price target from Wells Fargo, the average target price from 22 analysts for PH is $1,027.20, implying an 11.11% upside from its current price, and the consensus recommendation from 27 brokerage firms indicates an "Outperform" status.

feed.title: Oracle Data Center Nears $16 Billion Financing After Twisty Path
feed.summary: Related Digital is nearing finalization of $16 billion in financing for a large Oracle data center in Michigan. This financing follows several months of complex negotiations with investors. This new Oracle data center, once built, will power applications for OpenAI and adds to other massive debt packages arranged for Oracle data centers in Texas, Wisconsin, and New Mexico.

feed.title: EXPE: Wells Fargo Maintains Expedia Group Rating, Lowers Price T
feed.summary: Wells Fargo maintained its Equal-Weight rating on Expedia Group (EXPE) but lowered its price target from $315 to $311. This adjustment represents a 1.27% decrease from the previous target. Other recent analyst actions on EXPE include upgrades and price target revisions from Jefferies, Morgan Stanley, BTIG, Mizuho, and Citizens, reflecting a varied outlook on the stock.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Lowers Price Target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $74
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has lowered its price target for Eversource Energy (ES) to $74 from $78, while maintaining an "Overweight" rating. This adjustment comes amidst similar revisions from other analyst firms, including B of A Securities, UBS, and Mizuho, reflecting a broad re-evaluation of the company's future potential. Eversource Energy, a utility company serving over 4 million customers in the Northeast US, has an average analyst target price of $73.59, implying a 6.00% upside from its current price.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Adjusts Price Target for Rockwell Automation (ROK) t
feed.summary: Wells Fargo analyst Joseph O'Dea has lowered the price target for Rockwell Automation (ROK) from $410 to $360, while maintaining an 'Equal-Weight' rating. This adjustment reflects a 12.20% decrease in the price target. The article also provides historical analyst ratings for ROK and details about the company's operations and Wall Street forecasts.

feed.title: Norfolk Southern Advances Growth Strategy With New Short Line Partnership
feed.summary: Norfolk Southern Corporation has partnered with Jaguar Transport Holdings, LLC to enhance freight capacity and service in metro Atlanta. This collaboration involves Jaguar handling local switching, operating a transload terminal, and investing in infrastructure upgrades to boost freight volumes. The initiative aligns with Norfolk Southern's broader strategy to extend its network reach and improve local service through targeted partnerships, supporting its proposed combination with Union Pacific.

feed.title: Erie Indemnity (ERIE) CFO logs 401(k) share move, 2,081.74 credits
feed.summary: Erie Indemnity Company's EVP & CFO, Julie Marie Pelkowski, reported a participant-directed transaction within the company's 401(k) Plan, involving 2.679 shares of Class A common stock. Following this transaction, her direct holdings of Class A shares are 662.944. The filing also updated her Incentive Compensation Deferral Plan Share Credits to a total of 2,081.740 credits, which represent the right to receive an equivalent number of Class A shares upon her separation from the company.

feed.title: Ellucian Named a Leader in the Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for Second Consecutive Year
feed.summary: Ellucian has been recognized as a Leader in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant for Higher Education SaaS Student Information Systems for the second consecutive year. The company was positioned highest in Ability to Execute and furthest in Completeness of Vision, highlighting its strength in a student-first strategy and AI-powered innovation. Ellucian Student, designed for higher education, offers predictive analytics, embedded automation, and seamless integrations, serving over 2,600 institutions globally.

feed.title: Toy giant Hasbro hit by cyberattack that may take them 'several weeks' to recover from
feed.summary: Hasbro, the American toy-making giant, is currently battling an ongoing cyberattack that was detected on March 28th. The company has informed the SEC that it may take "several weeks" to fully resolve the incident, impacting its ability to conduct business, although they are implementing continuity plans. While some parts of its online presence are down, the specific nature of the attack, whether data was stolen, or if ransom demands were made, remains unclear.

feed.title: YieldMax Bitcoin Option Income Strategy ETF announces weekly distribution of $0.2624
feed.summary: The YieldMax Bitcoin Option Income Strategy ETF has announced a weekly distribution of $0.2624 per share. This distribution is noteworthy for investors focusing on income-generating strategies tied to Bitcoin options.

feed.title: Wipro Kicks Off New FY With AI Unit Launch, Leadership Rejig
feed.summary: Wipro has launched a new AI unit called "ai.go" and undergone a significant leadership reshuffle at the start of its new financial year. The company aims to integrate AI capabilities across its operations and solutions, signaling a strategic focus on artificial intelligence as a core driver for future growth. This move underlines Wipro's commitment to advancing its technological offerings and streamlining its organizational structure for enhanced efficiency in the evolving tech landscape.

feed.title: Every 5 XORTX shares become 1 on April 6 after approvals
feed.summary: XORTX Therapeutics Inc. has confirmed that its 1-for-5 share consolidation will take effect on April 6, 2026, after receiving all necessary approvals from the TSX Venture Exchange and Nasdaq. This move aims to adjust the company's issued and outstanding share count and address Nasdaq's minimum bid requirement to maintain its listing. The consolidation will replace every five old common shares with one new common share.

feed.title: XORTX Confirms Effective Date of Share Consolidation
feed.summary: XORTX Therapeutics Inc. (NASDAQ: XRTX | TSXV: XRTX | Frankfurt: ANU) announced that the share consolidation, on a one-for-five basis, has received all necessary approvals from the TSX Venture Exchange and Nasdaq Stock Exchange. The consolidation will become effective on April 6, 2026. XORTX is a clinical-stage pharmaceutical company developing therapies for gout and progressive kidney disease.

feed.title: Xortx Therapeutics To Consolidate Shares 1-For-5 Effective April 6, 2026
feed.summary: Xortx Therapeutics (XRTX) announced a 1-for-5 reverse stock split, effective April 6, 2026. This consolidation aims to reduce the number of outstanding shares, often pursued to meet exchange listing requirements or increase per-share value. The news was reported by Reuters via Refinitiv and is less than a minute read.

feed.title: XORTX (XRTX) wins approvals for 1-for-5 share consolidation effective April 6, 2026
feed.summary: XORTX Therapeutics Inc. (XRTX) has received all necessary approvals from the TSX Venture Exchange and Nasdaq Stock Exchange for its previously announced 1-for-5 share consolidation. This consolidation will become effective on April 6, 2026. The company is a late-stage clinical pharmaceutical business with three advanced programs targeting gout and progressive kidney diseases, plus a pre-clinical program for Type 2 diabetic nephropathy.
